title: Embedding board views in an iframe
excerpt: I’m trying to embed board views into my company’s wiki, but it’s impossible to get it to display nicely. Is there any way to remove the border around the board view? Or to embed a single widget? Essentially, I have boxes…

posts.author: kmcdaniel (Katie McDaniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to embed board views into my company’s wiki, but it’s impossible to get it to display nicely. Is there any way to remove the border around the board view? Or to embed a single widget? Essentially, I have boxes within boxes, and it looks awful.

Screenshot 2023-01-19 at 2.24.11 PM1339×699 38.2 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @kmcdaniel! I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to embed a single widget, however this is great feedback you have provided. Additionally, the border will remain with the shared board view at this time, although I can understand visually it may not be most appealing - we will also share this internally. We did want to check that the relevant information is displaying correctly however, and the issue is regarding the format of the shared board views?

posts.author: kmcdaniel (Katie McDaniel)
posts.cookedHtml: Correct. The board frames make the solution completely unuseable, I’m afraid. We’re going with another solution to track this information, which is a shame because we’re really trying to champion monday.com internally.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry to hear this Katie That really is a shame, and I will certainly be sure to relay this to the relevant department. I hope we can make an improvement to this feature, so we can avoid roadblocks like this in the near future

posts.author: Turgi (Niran)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m wondering if there’s any update or workaround for this issue…

posts.author: MASO (Markus @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kmcdaniel and @Turgi

you might want to take a look at our fairly new Board to Website Widget app, which lets you transform a board into a fully customized widget, that can be shared with a link or embedded seamlessly with an iframe into any website. You have full control on its look and feel, as well on the data being displayed – without touching your original board.

Check out the demos for some inspiration, and let me know what you think.

– Markus from Gorilla Apps

posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this? I really need to embed a Kanban board view that can be interacted with by my team.
